svg.title: Library borrower trend breakdown
svg.desc: Borrower-level circulation trend breakdown from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-15. The export focuses on the top 4 borrowers by loans touching the selected range and includes active-loan and overdue-loan trend panels plus a summary table.
svg.text: Top borrower cohorts from the SQLite circulation history, exported as a static trend pack for portfolio screenshots and recruiter walkthroughs.

g.text: loans touching this range, peak active 2
loans touching this range, peak active 2
loans touching this range, peak active 2
loans touching this range, peak active 1

g.title: Active loans by borrower
